channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: FBI director invites fresh scrutiny over travels with appearance at US men's hockey team celebration - NPR
item.description:
1. FBI director invites fresh scrutiny over travels with appearance at US men's hockey team celebration  NPR
  2. Kash Patel’s use of the FBI jet sparks outrage. Here’s why he couldn’t travel to the Olympics any other way  CNN
  3. Jim Jordan defends Patel’s Olympic partying, citing ‘security focus’ of trip  The Hill
  4. FBI's Patel defends beer-soaked Olympic celebration while on Italy trip  Reuters
  5. Olympics trip raises questions about Patel's use of taxpayer dollars  PBS

item.title: 12th century Crusader sword discovered "by chance" by student off coast of Israel, university says - CBS News
item.description:
1. 12th century Crusader sword discovered "by chance" by student off coast of Israel, university says  CBS News
  2. Diver finds his second Crusader sword in 5 years off Israel’s coast  The Times of Israel
  3. Haifa University student discovers 12th century Crusader sword off of Israel’s northern coast  Yahoo
  4. Swimmer Strikes Again: 900-year-old Crusader Sword Found Off Israel's Coast  Haaretz
  5. Student finds 800-year-old crusader sword off Israeli coast  Azərtac
